subcodes.first_line: O Letter Ra! Hearken unto the Call of God in the sacred realm of eternity, that spot which God hath sanctified beyond all understanding [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حرف الرا اسمع ندا الله فی قدس البقا بقعه التی قدسها الله عن عرفان
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @banishment to; life in Constantinople, @praise and encouragement
